description_long: This is a large, military-style cargo airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted, swept-back wing configuration. The aircraft features four prominent turbofan engines mounted under the wings, providing significant thrust for heavy lifting. Its tail section is characterized by a T-tail design, with a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop a tall vertical fin. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with multiple wheels for stability during ground operations. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with a rounded nose and a series of windows for visibility. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color, giving it a stealthy and utilitarian appearance.
description: A large, dark-colored cargo airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, a T-tail, and a high-mounted swept wing. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, high-mounted swept wings, four underwing engines, and prominent T-tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide wingspan, engine placement, and the T-tail's vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the engines and tail structure.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, four engines, and the broad, high-mounted wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept-back wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four turbofan engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with multiple main and nose gear units, likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
